The Grand Haveli (Resort) Namaste and a warm welcome to The Grand Haveli – your serene escape nestled in the foothills of the majestic Himalayas and alongside the sacred Huel River. We are honored to have you with us and hope that your stay will be a blend of relaxation, rejuvenation, and unforgettable experiences. Our resort is designed to offer you a peaceful retreat from the hustle of daily life, where modern comforts meet the tranquility of nature. Whether you’re here to indulge in our luxurious facilities, savor the flavors at our multi-cuisine restaurant, enjoy the serenity of our outdoor pool, or explore the spiritual and adventure-filled offerings of Rishikesh – we aim to make your stay truly special. Highlight: 1:- Wellness & Relaxation Facilities Offer Jacuzzi Bath 2:- Luxury Accommodation: Deluxe Premium Rooms 3:- Dine, Delight, Repeat ( Unforgettable Premium Cuisine ) 4:- Swimming Pool 5:- Wide range of premium amenities 6:- Surrounded by the raw beauty of nature 7:- Bird-Watching 8:- Bonfire- Barbecue- Night 9:- Our-premium-facilities 10:- Large Party-Celebration 11:- Large Spacious Venue Area 12:- Banquet Available For Party Or Corporate Function we welcome you just as you are. The Grand Haveli (Imagine a serene, tranquil escape nestled within the heart of nature) Call: +91 7579052424, 75790523434 Email: resortthegrandhaveli@gmail.com Resort Location: Yamkeshwar, Mohan Chatti, Bairagarh, Uttarakhand 249304 Website: www.thegrandhaveli.com We hope you have a memorable and enriching experience.
